description_long: This train station features a prominent octagonal base with a wraparound covered veranda, accessible by multiple staircases radiating outward. The central structure rises into a large, greenish-copper dome with several dormer windows and decorative trim, topped by a tall, ornate cupola and chimney. The lower level is clad in brown and beige materials, with large windows and doors likely providing entry to the interior. The roof's patina suggests aged metal, while the wooden or stone base gives a sense of solidity and historical character. The overall design is symmetrical, with architectural details such as arched windows, decorative cornices, and a multi-tiered roofline. The station exudes a grand, historic ambiance, reminiscent of late 19th or early 20th-century European civic architecture.
description: A grand, octagonal train station with a green copper dome, wraparound veranda, and ornate cupola, featuring multiple staircases and historic architectural details.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance with two staircases leading up to the veranda and a clear view of the central dome and cupola.
description_view_1: This angle shows the side of the station, revealing additional staircases and the symmetry of the octagonal base, with the dome and cupola still prominent.
description_view_2: This view is similar to the front but slightly rotated, showing the arrangement of windows and the continuity of the veranda around the structure.
description_view_3: This perspective displays the rear or another side of the station, with staircases and windows mirroring the front, emphasizing the building's symmetry.
attribute_platform_canopies: None; the structure has a wraparound veranda but no distinct platform canopies or shelters are visible.
attribute_station_signage: None; there are no visible signs or station nameplates in any of the views.
attribute_ticket_vending_machines: None; no ticket vending machines are visible in or around the station.
attribute_railway_tracks: None; there are no railway tracks visible in the images.
